baseline.predicted_rationale:
Design B features a clean, refined layout with a clear visual hierarchy and good use of whitespace. The large product image dominates appropriately, drawing immediate focus while keeping supporting text and controls well spaced below. Typography is legible, color contrast is strong where it matters (price and call-to-action), and primary controls like “Add to Cart” are visually distinct and easily accessible.  

Design A, though visually interesting, feels darker and slightly more compressed; the content blocks and bright floating elements compete for attention, and the “Sign up” button is pushed low in the layout. Overall, B appears more polished, balanced, and user-focused, aligning with the annotator’s preferences for clarity and usability.
